project.component: { "keyToString": { "DefaultHtmlFileTemplate": "HTML File", "JavaScript 调试.AI智能排班系统.html.executor": "Debug", "JavaScript 调试.localhost:3000.executor": "Run", "JavaScript 调试.test.html.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Node.js.script.js.executor": "Run", "Node.js.server.js.executor": "Run", "Node.js.test1.js.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "disable.download.node.interpreter.editor.notification": "true", "javascript.nodejs.core.library.configured.version": "24.13.0", "javascript.nodejs.core.library.typings.version": "24.10.9", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "G:/华为家庭存储/办公学习文件（按年份）/创新工作室/AI智能排班系统", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_interpreter_path": "node", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "configurable.group.language", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "ts.external.directory.path": "D:\\交互软件\\WebStorm 2025.2.2\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
